---
title: 'SEAL: A Single-Event Architecture for In-Sensor Visual Localization'
author:
- Ryan Hou
- Thomas Twomey
- Vasileios Milionis
- Evangelos Dikopoulos
- Tianrui Ma
- Yuhao Zhu
- Georgios Tzimpragos
categories:
- Show All
- Work We Contributed to
topics:
- visual_computing_systems
url_source: https://dl.acm.org/doi/pdf/10.1145/3695053.3731034
journ: ISCA
year: 2025
contrib: Work We Contributed to
image: featured.png
pub_number: 93
---
